author: @davidvasconcellos6858

title: 99.1 The Sports Animal review of the Tennessee win vs. Austin Peay
body: Funny thing was the announcer said he saw Tennessee in practice and none of the receivers dropped a pass. Worried about Milton. Always have been. This next weekend will be the ultimate test.
author: @michaeld5770

title: 99.1 The Sports Animal review of the Tennessee win vs. Austin Peay
body: I'm not ready to give up on Milton, it wasn't all him but he's the leader of the offense and he needs to step up and make sure his receivers are on the same page.  They have an opportunity to show everyone how much he has improved... this is his team and next week is his chance.  Also the Defense is clearly much improved, so we'll need the defense to take over next week too.
author: @LuisVelazquezLV3

title: 99.1 The Sports Animal review of the Tennessee win vs. Austin Peay
body: After Milton’s performance in the Orange bowl and the raving reviews that he has received from the coaching staff and players, I really expected to see a very good offense, but the play against the team last night that gave up 49 points to a lesser school last week, now has me in the worry mode. I’m not quite in the Nico frame of mind yet, but it looks like Milton is the QB of 2021.
author: @drumking388

title: 99.1 The Sports Animal review of the Tennessee win vs. Austin Peay
body: The game has never slowed down for Milton. We have what you see at quarterback. And those dam uniforms. We are ORANGE AND WHITE!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
author: @dexculpepper-py1jr

title: 99.1 The Sports Animal review of the Tennessee win vs. Austin Peay
body: You cant win in the SEC if an offense performs like that. In the end you have to score more points than the opponent.  Idk any SEC team that would have Tennessee would have beat last night playing like that.  Playing down to an opponent is a sign of an immature team.  They should know better.
author: @wordword6039

title: TENNESSEE VS AUSTIN PEAY GAME REVIEW
body: We are in trouble fellas . Loosing the depth we lost and we lost offensive guru in corridination . The game was huepel worst since being hired .i really hope your right about not wanting to expose the plays i really do . Yesterday made me feel hopeless for the season
author: @heveyweightheveyweight5399
